strengths: ~14 years of broad full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backends
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) at re:cinq
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial drive and end-to-end product ownership
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product leadership or recognized AI expertise required for a Principal AI Strategy role
Career level is Senior/Staff IC, not Director-level Principal with strategic advisory experience
Limited cloud-platform depth (some AWS CDK) and no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud product direction

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and recognized AI products
Seniority gap vs. Director-level Principal IC
Breadth of engineering experience and entrepreneurial founder track record

response.justification: The candidate is a solid, versatile senior engineer with ~14 years of experience, founder credentials, and recent dabbling in agentic AI tooling, but the role demands a Director-level Principal with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products at scale, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers on cloud and AI direction. The resume shows neither the AI depth nor the strategic leadership footprint required, making this a clear level and domain mismatch.
